arts.sum: Beyond his Premier League stats, Díaz has scored once in the Carabao Cup and added three goals and one assist in the UEFA Champions League. The Colombian has made a significant impact on the attacking front, clocking 1,121 minutes across 18 matches and contributing to ten goals, with eight scored and two assisted.

arts.ttl: Arsenal deal to sign Martin Zubimendi 'virtually completed'
arts.sum: Arsenal are finally set to sign long-time target Martin Zubimendi, according to a sensational report from the Daily Mail . According to the Daily Mail, Arsenal are on the verge of completing a deal for Zubimendi that will see him link up with Arteta's side in the summer.
